heading: Management plan
label: 410rr–4 Management plan
notes: Amendments1994— in introductory provisions substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs” after “Committee on”.Pub. L. 103–437
amendments: Amendments1994— in introductory provisions substituted “Natural Resources” for “Interior and Insular Affairs” after “Committee on”.Pub. L. 103–437

children.text: a general visitor use and interpretive program that fully considers the prehistoric and historic aspects of the national historical park including the “gateway theme” and early Spanish settlement of New Mexico;
a statement on the number of visitors and types of public uses within the park which can be reasonably accommodated in accordance with the protection of its resources; and
a general development plan for the park, including the estimated cost thereof.
